## What game does this bridge cover?

<!-- Name + platform + version range -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Bridge ID matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{2,31}$` and equals the directory name.
- [ ] `manifest.json` has all required fields.
- [ ] `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and `icon.png` (≥128×128) or `icon.svg` are present.
- [ ] No external HTTPS URLs in the manifest.
- [ ] I have NOT set the `"recommended"` tag (it is reserved for maintainers).
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under the MIT License (see [LICENSE](../LICENSE)).
